title: Merch Question about for an eva medicom kubrick figure
display_title: Merch Question about for an eva medicom kubrick figure
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Question about for an eva medicom kubrick figure             Quote Post by gusstoys » Thu Feb 22, 2018 7:51 pm Hi to all. this is my first post in this site. hello to everyone. please if the administrator thinks that this post must be in other board please let me know ASAP. im a kubrick collector. and i have the complete NG evangelion medicom kubrick collection. just kubricks , no bearbricks. but i have a doubt since a long time. a few years ago i saw a DAMGED Rei "chase"/rare figure in the series 1 EVANGELION 1.0 do you know about this figure? some day a guy in Japan told me that he owned..but he wants more than 50usd for this figure. its a really exist figure? its the variant of this one: please help me to solve this doubt..and if you have one i need it

[]: Re: Question about for an eva medicom kubrick figure             Quote Post by Zeruss » Fri Mar 02, 2018 1:53 am First of all, hello fellow Kubrick collector! And second, there indeed is! Just as there are other variants in the Eva Rebuild Kubrick sets (like the "red Mari" or the "jetpack Unit-02" ) the 1.0 set has a "bandaged Rei" variant: SPOILER: Show
